TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Atonan I tiniay i Cian Siang no Hualien ko Atonan a niyaro', 863 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,103 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 26% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 541 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 74% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,562 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 17%, Truku 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 3%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Talihafan
S.PHON: ato~unan i tiniaj i ʦian siaŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u ato~unan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. taɾiħafan
S.FORM: Atonan I tiniay i Cian Siang no Hualien ko Atonan a niyaro', 863 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,103 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 26% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 541 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 74% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,562 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 17%, Truku 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 3%, Paiwan 1%, Puyuma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Talihafan
